text: Tim Cook announced that Apple will invest $2 billion in a new research facility in Cupertino, California by the end of 2026.
The United Nations headquarters in New York hosted a summit attended by leaders from 45 countries on March 15th.
Dr. Sarah Chen of MIT published groundbreaking findings in Nature about quantum computing applications in drug discovery.
Tesla CEO Elon Musk confirmed the company will open a $5 billion factory in Berlin, Germany next quarter.
Microsoft and OpenAI announced a $10 billion partnership at a press conference in Seattle on January 23rd.
The World Health Organization reported that Dr. Maria Rodriguez from the University of São Paulo made a breakthrough in malaria treatment.
Amazon founder Jeff Bezos donated $100 million to the Smithsonian Institution in Washington, D.C. last Tuesday.
Google DeepMind researcher Dr. James Park presented new AI safety findings at the Royal Society in London on December 5th.
